projectDescription: A lightweight ChatGPT Projects protocol that keeps long idea-shaping sessions structurally coherent by using real operating gates, append-only memory signals, and strict separation between shaping notes and final artifacts.
keyFeatures: Append-only memory signals that preserve continuity without file-management drift
Three explicit operating states (READING_ALIGNMENT, SHAPING, SYNTHESIS) with strict transition rules
Real gate system that prevents premature synthesis and fake closure
Authority order that keeps current OP instruction dominant over memory signals and inference
Clean separation between internal shaping notes and final artifact output
Minimal Python helper (stdlib-only) for deterministic, timestamped note persistence
Eight typed memory signal categories (mode, shape, gate, decision, discard, tension, source, artifact)
Protocol-only fallback mode when Python execution is unavailable
publicApiSurface: note-io.md — I/O boundary contract between GPT and Python
